nasb.text: “At that time,” declares the Lord, “I will be the God of all the families of Israel, and they shall be My people.”

esv.text: “At that time, declares the Lord, I will be the God of all the clans of Israel, and they shall be my people.”

cnv.text: “到那時，我必作以色列各家族的　神，他們要作我的子民。”這是耶和華的宣告。

ccb.text: 耶和华说：“那时，我要做以色列各宗族的上帝，他们必做我的子民。
